OpenVK CSRF / GET-write STR

For your staging only. Open this file while logged in as the victim (club owner / user with coins). Placeholders are filled by str_all.sh into evil_csrf.generated.html.

Base: http://127.0.0.1:8088 · Club: CLUB_ID · Attacker user: ATTACKER_USER_ID

P0-8 Club setAdmin via GET (no CSRF)

As club owner, clicking/loading this promotes ATTACKER_USER_ID:

Open setAdmin link

Image CSRF (auto):

P0-7 /rpc token mint (manual)

Browser JS cannot easily craft MessagePack. Use DevTools on http://127.0.0.1:8088/authorize → Allow → copy POST /rpc and replay from another origin without CSRF hash, or use a msgpack client with session cookie.

P1-12 Illustrative state-changing forms (adjust paths)

These forms omit CSRF hash. Update action URLs to match your instance routes before demo.

Wall delete (example — set post ids)

Support ticket delete (example)
